name: DoIP_SendPDUCombination
title: DoIP_SendPDUCombination
description: Send the combined PDUs on the open TCP connection in one block. Typically, the PDUs will be sent in one IP packet, depending on the PDU size of the transporting medium.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
